mapper.select:
SELECT user_approval.id , user_approval.deleted , user_approval.created_at as createdAt , user_approval.modified_at as modifiedAt
, user_approval.approval_role as approvalRole , user_approval.user_id as userId , user_approval.approval_id as approvalId FROM user_approval WHERE user_approval.id = #{id}
mapper.sql: WHERE user_approval.id is not null AND user_approval.deleted = #{deleted}
